use_cases: Primary action buttons for forms and calls-to-action
Destructive action confirmations with variant styling
Secondary and ghost button alternatives for hierarchy
Icon-only buttons for compact UI actions
ai_summary: A versatile React button component built with Radix UI Slot and class-variance-authority, offering multiple visual variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and sizes. Features hover transitions, focus-visible outlines, disabled states, and composable asChild prop for rendering flexibility. Designed as a reusable atomic component for consistent button styling across applications.
